title: Varys
description: Settings for Varys — your DS assistant for Jupyter Notebook. Model names and provider selection are configured via the .env file in your notebook directory.

executionMode.title: Execution Mode
executionMode.description: Controls when cells are auto-executed after the assistant creates them.

inlineCompletion.title: Enable Inline Completion
inlineCompletion.description: Show AI ghost-text suggestions as you type in code cells.

multilineCompletion.title: Enable Multi-line Completion
multilineCompletion.description: When manually triggered (Ctrl+Space), suggest 3-5 lines instead of one.
